functions.name: distro_info.convert_date
documentation: Convert a date string in ISO 8601 into a datetime object.

functions.name: distro_info._get_data_dir
documentation: Get the data directory based on the module location.

classes.name: distro_info.DistroDataOutdated
documentation: Distribution data outdated.

classes.name: distro_info.DistroRelease

methods.name: distro_info.DistroRelease.__init__
documentation: pylint: disable=too-few-public-methods
pylint: disable=too-many-instance-attributes

methods.name: distro_info.DistroRelease.is_supported
documentation: Check whether this release is supported on the given date.
Represents a distributions release

classes.name: distro_info.DistroInfo

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo.all
documentation: List codenames of all known distributions.

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo.get_all
documentation: List all known distributions.

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo._avail
documentation: Return all distributions that were available on the given date.

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo.codename
documentation: Map codename aliases to the codename they describe.

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo.version
documentation: Map codename or series to version

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo.devel
documentation: Get latest development distribution based on the given date.

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo._format
documentation: Format a given distribution entry.

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo.stable
documentation: Get latest stable distribution based on the given date.

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo.supported
documentation: Get list of all supported distributions based on the given date.

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo.valid
documentation: Check if the given codename is known.

methods.name: distro_info.DistroInfo.unsupported
documentation: Get list of all unsupported distributions based on the given date.

Base class for distribution information.
Use DebianDistroInfo or UbuntuDistroInfo instead of using this directly.

classes.name: distro_info.DebianDistroInfo

methods.name: distro_info.DebianDistroInfo.codename
documentation: Map 'unstable', 'testing', etc. to their codenames.

methods.name: distro_info.DebianDistroInfo.devel
documentation: Get latest development distribution based on the given date.

methods.name: distro_info.DebianDistroInfo.old
documentation: Get old (stable) Debian distribution based on the given date.

methods.name: distro_info.DebianDistroInfo.supported
documentation:
Get list of all supported Debian distributions based on the given
date.

methods.name: distro_info.DebianDistroInfo.lts_supported
documentation:
Get list of all LTS supported Debian distributions based on the given
date.

methods.name: distro_info.DebianDistroInfo.elts_supported
documentation:
Get list of all Extended LTS supported Debian distributions based on
the given date.

methods.name: distro_info.DebianDistroInfo.testing
documentation: Get latest testing Debian distribution based on the given date.

methods.name: distro_info.DebianDistroInfo.valid
documentation: Check if the given codename is known.
provides information about Debian's distributions

classes.name: distro_info.UbuntuDistroInfo

methods.name: distro_info.UbuntuDistroInfo.lts
documentation:
Get latest long term support (LTS) Ubuntu distribution based on the
given date.

methods.name: distro_info.UbuntuDistroInfo.is_lts
documentation: Is codename an LTS release?

methods.name: distro_info.UbuntuDistroInfo.supported
documentation:
Get list of all supported Ubuntu distributions based on the given
date.

methods.name: distro_info.UbuntuDistroInfo.supported_esm
documentation:
Get list of all ESM supported Ubuntu distributions based on the
given date.
provides information about Ubuntu's distributions
